title: Immersive Interfaces - Farmer's Delight
description: This texture pack adds special compatibility with Farmer's Delight, integrating its grooves into the aesthetics of Immersive Interfaces.
body: **Bundle Texture Pack Compat** [**Immersive Interfaces - Mod Support Unofficial**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/immersive-interfaces-mod-support-unofficial) ### Immersive Interfaces - Mod Support Unofficial This texture pack adds special compatibility with Farmer's Delight, integrating its grooves into the aesthetics of Immersive Interfaces. ### Before: ![a](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fa3f71736d8845c4ebac55abec62336752fd1f84.png) ### After: ![b](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bb95b4884bb2286d1f274630ef893345ba973108.png)
